Fight monsters, gather resources,
level up skills, explore the world.

GRIMFELL · OVERWORLD

⚔️
Real-time Combat
Abilities, stuns & shields. Fight 9 monster types across multiple zones.
🌲
Gathering & Skills
Mine, chop, fish & cook. Level up 9 skills and craft better gear.
📖
Monster Codex
Discover every creature. Unlock lore entries by seeing and slaying them.
🌐
Multiplayer
See other players roaming the world. Play solo or alongside adventurers.
